def 
```
nums = [4,3,2,1]
result = []

for num in nums:
    if num % 2 == 0:
        num = 0
    else:
        num = 1
    result.append(num)

result.sort()
return result
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n.log(n))
space complexity: O(n)
